ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the patient (0 for female, 1 for male) */,
  "chest_pain" INTEGER /* Chest pain type (1-4) */,
  "rest_bps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure */,
  "cholestrol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar level */,
  "rest_ecg" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiogram results */,
  "thalach" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exer_angina" INTEGER /* Exercise-induced angina (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "old_peak" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "slope" INTEGER /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thalassemia" INTEGER /* Thalassemia (1-3) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider information of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the hospital (number of beds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease or condition diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms presented by the patient */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of any medical tests performed */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan prescribed by the doctor */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the medical staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the medical staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the staff member works */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the medical staff member (e.g., cardiology, oncology) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the medical staff member */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the medical staff member (e.g., MD, RN, PhD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_staff_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being treated */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member treating the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medical_history" (
  "patient_medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient medical history */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being treated */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "patient_allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being treated */,
  "allergy" TEXT /* Allergy diagnosed */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction to the allergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
